scripts.develop: unset DEBUG && HOME=${HOME:-/tmp} XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-/tmp} gatsby develop
scripts.start: unset DEBUG && HOME=${HOME:-/tmp} XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-/tmp} gatsby develop
scripts.build: unset DEBUG && HOME=${HOME:-/tmp} XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-/tmp} gatsby build
scripts.serve: unset DEBUG && HOME=${HOME:-/tmp} XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-/tmp} gatsby serve
